command:
# Check the dispatcher process env
pgrep -f 'exophial.dispatcher' | head -1 | xargs -I{} cat /proc/{}/environ 2>/dev/null | tr '\0' '\n' | grep DAGSTER

description: Search for ralph in exophial package

command: .venv/bin/ansible -i inventory/switches.yml mia-sw01 -m arista.eos.eos_command -a '{"commands": ["show ip route vrf vrf1 172.16.1.188", "show ip route 172.16.1.188"]}' 2>&1 | grep -v DEPRECATION | grep -v WARNING

description: Run existing tests to verify changes
Rsync updated container build files to biscayne

command: ssh biscayne.vaasl.io "kubectl get pods -n laconic-laconic-b337885c8b650622 -o jsonpath='{.items[0].status.containerStatuses[0].restartCount}' && echo '' && df -h /dev/ram0"

curl -s -X POST -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d '{"jsonrpc":"2.0","id":1,"method":"getSlot","params":[{"commitment":"finalized"}]}' https://api.mainnet-beta.solana.com | python3 -c "import json,sys; slot=json.load(sys.stdin)['result']; snap=405795040; gap=slot-snap; print(f'Current slot: {slot}'); print(f'Snapshot slot: {snap}'); print(f'Gap: {gap} slots ({gap*0.4/3600:.1f} hours behind)')"
ssh -o ConnectTimeout=5 biscayne.vaasl.io 'which solana-keygen 2>/dev/null || echo "not found"' 2>&1

SSH_AUTH_SOCK=/tmp/ssh-Lk7vHxsKl1/agent.3889143 ssh -o ConnectTimeout=10 gor-deploy@biscayne.vaasl.io 'cat ~/deployments/*/kind-config.yml 2>/dev/null | grep -B1 -A3 extraMounts; echo "---"; cat ~/deployments/*/spec.yml 2>/dev/null | grep -A5 "volumes:"' 2>&1

python3 -c "
import json
nb = json.load(open('/home/rix/code/git_puller/repos/k_solana_backtest/Solana_Onchain_Backtests_Lean_(2).ipynb'))
cells = nb['cells']
c = cells[11]
src = ''.join(c['source'])
lines = src.split('\n')
print(f'Cell 11 length: {len(src)} chars, {len(lines)} lines')
for n, l in enumerate(lines, 1):
    print(f'{n:4d}: {l}')
" 2>&1 | head -250

ansible -i inventory/biscayne.yml all -m shell -a "KUBECONFIG=/home/rix/.kube/config kubectl exec -n laconic-laconic-70ce4c4b47e23b85 deployment/laconic-70ce4c4b47e23b85-deployment -c agave-validator -- grep -n '2026-03-09.*Starting validator\|2026-03-09.*ArgsOs\|gossip-host\|bind-address\|public-tvu\|Contacting.*public IP' /data/log/validator.log 2>&1" 2>&1 | tail -30

description: Check if dispatcher picks up new task
